2129730.name: ZombieSquad Ghouls Guns N Guts
2129730.description:
Fight The Voxelized Zombie Hoards in this FPS online Co-op Survival shooter. Heed The Call of Voxels as you and your friends unlock more areas and powerups as you progress through a vast maze of post apocalyptic ruin. Purchase a gun from the wall or the "random mystery gun chest". Get your Friends up before they are down for the count... You already know the drill, but now in shiny retro-indie voxel flavors! Every copy comes with standardized, stylized square blood chunk splats. Aim for the head to conserve ammunition!


Join the Playtest By becoming a member of the Zombie Squad Discord
2129730.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
